objective: Deliver manual competitor ads intelligence CLI with deterministic parser + OCR/VLM fallback, and validate with a sample run.
non_goals: No automated scheduling or background publishing
No weakening of fail-closed evidence requirements

completed: Deterministic Cheerio parser implemented in lib/competitor-ad-parser (parsePpomppuPost).
CLI script scripts/competitor-ads-intel.ts uses deterministic parse and falls back to OCR/VLM when confidence < 0.9 or products missing.
OCR/VLM env vars added and wired (OLLAMA_* + defaults in config/env.ts and runtime validation).
gaps: Sample run still failing with Playwright errors: 'Target page, context or browser has been closed'.
Need to re-run sample pipeline and confirm JSONL output + run-summary success.
Validate OCR/VLM stability (Ollama) if fallback path is used.

decisions_locked: Fallback model: qwen2.5vl:3b when primary model fails.
Fail-closed: missing products or evidence must throw error.
acceptance_criteria: Each record includes products, posted_at, and non-empty evidence sources.
Deterministic parser is used first; OCR/VLM is fallback only.
implementation_plan: If Playwright 'page closed' errors persist, audit processPostWithRetry + closeQuietly flow for premature closure.
Verify deterministic parse output (products, posted_at, vendor) meets evidence requirements.
Update docs or error handling only if new findings require changes.
practical_recommendations: Start the next session with npm run mempalace:wake-up and confirm mempalace_status.
Run: npm run competitor-ads:intel -- --input-csv examples/competitor-ads-intel.sample.csv --run-id sample-YYYYMMDD --rate-limit-rps 1.
Inspect artifacts/competitor-ads/<run_id>/logs/*.json for errors and raw_html for parser debugging.
If Ollama errors reappear, lower concurrency and verify image format (JPEG) and size caps.
completed_items: Created scripts/competitor-ads-intel.ts CLI pipeline with deterministic parse + OCR/VLM fallback.
Updated env parsing/validation and spec-kit schema/contract for OLLAMA_* vars.
Expanded README and CLAUDE.md with competitor ads intel docs.
pending_items: Re-run sample extraction and confirm successful records output.
Resolve Playwright 'Target page, context or browser has been closed' errors from sample run.
Validate OCR/VLM fallback behavior with Ollama if deterministic parse is insufficient.
decisions: Prefer deterministic HTML parsing (Cheerio) and use OCR/VLM only when confidence is low.
Keep evidence sources non-empty and fail the run if evidence is missing.
Use JPEG screenshots for OCR/VLM to avoid format errors.
constraints: Manual execution only; no automated scheduler for competitor intel.
Do not log secrets or credentials.
Publisher/observer systems must remain fail-closed for missing evidence.
next_actions: Run mempalace wake-up and check status at session start.
Re-run sample CLI and review artifacts for errors.
Fix Playwright lifetime issues if page closed errors persist.
